name: feature.email.agents
description: Email feature agent pack (ADR 0014) — a copywriter agent that drafts/optimizes campaign subject + body (the baseline's email.generate / email.optimize). Tool-allowlisted to feature.email.nodes only; it writes copy, it does not send. Mirrors feature.kb.agents.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Email Copywriter
agents.description: Drafts and optimizes marketing campaign copy (subject line + body, with {{contact.*}} merge fields). May read existing templates for style via feature.email.nodes.list-templates. Writes copy only — it does NOT send (no send tool in its allowlist, by design).
